name: RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-10
title: Add scope-guard override mode with human approval: one-time or session-long, with red [rabbit] alert when guard is off
description:
Add a human-approved override mechanism to scope-guard.sh.

Override modes:
  one-time  — lets the current denied write through; guard re-arms immediately after.
              A single red [rabbit] alert fires at the NEXT Stop event, then stops.
  session   — guard stays down for the whole session until manually re-armed.
              Red [rabbit] alert fires at EVERY Stop until re-armed.

Implementation:
  Marker files: .rabbit-scope-override (one-time|session) and .rabbit-scope-override-used
  scope-guard: before default deny, check marker; one-time=ALLOW+delete+create-used; session=ALLOW
  rbt-sync-check Stop hook: session marker exists=red alert; used marker exists=red alert+delete

Human approval: scope-guard blocks, Claude tells user to create the marker (one-time or session).
User creating the marker IS the approval act.
